title: Styphnolobium affine
intro: Styphnolobium affine, also known as the Golden Acacia or Yellow Acacia, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with health benefits including its ability to lower cholesterol and blood sugar levels, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The bioactive constituents of Styphnolobium affine include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is commonly prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive problems.
